chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4516 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.20141/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 06.10.2025. Mr. Sohail Hameed, Advocate for the Petitioner. ---- This Petition does not appear to be maintainable inasmuch as the appropriate course of action would be to the Petitioner to file civil proceedings for the purposes of establishing his title. On query posed, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner has already availed such a remedy. That being so, the instant Petition stands dismissed accordingly, alongwith the pending Miscellaneous Application. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
